requirement_topic.en: EMC Evidence Under SANS Adoptions of CISPR / IEC Standards
requirement_topic.zh: 依据 SANS 采标 CISPR / IEC 标准的 EMC 证据
requirement_topic.zht: 依據 SANS 採標 CISPR / IEC 標準的 EMC 證據

summary.en: PV inverters use high-frequency power electronics, so South African technical files may require EMC evidence under SANS adoptions of CISPR and IEC EMC standards, such as radio-disturbance, harmonics, flicker, immunity, and installation-specific compatibility evidence. The applicable standard set depends on the product classification, connection point, and approval or project route.
summary.zh: 光伏逆变器使用高频电力电子器件，因此南非技术文件可能要求依据 SANS 采标的 CISPR 和 IEC EMC 标准提供 EMC 证据，例如无线电骚扰、谐波、闪烁、抗扰度及安装特定兼容性证据。适用标准组合取决于产品分类、接入点以及批准或项目路径。
summary.zht: 光伏逆變器使用高頻電力電子器件，因此南非技術文件可能要求依據 SANS 採標的 CISPR 和 IEC EMC 標準提供 EMC 證據，例如無線電騷擾、諧波、閃爍、抗擾度及安裝特定相容性證據。適用標準組合取決於產品分類、接入點以及批准或專案路徑。

standards_or_laws: SANS adoption of CISPR radio-disturbance standards where applicable
SANS adoption of IEC 61000 EMC standards where applicable
Project or distributor power-quality and EMC evidence requirements

summary.en: China EMC files may reference GB 4824 / CISPR 11 alignment, GB 17625 harmonic-current limits, GB/T 17626 immunity tests, or other GB EMC standards. These reports can support a technical comparison but should be checked against the exact SANS / CISPR / IEC edition and South African acceptance route.
summary.zh: 中国 EMC 文件可能引用 GB 4824 / CISPR 11 协调标准、GB 17625 谐波电流限值、GB/T 17626 抗扰度测试或其他 GB EMC 标准。这些报告可支持技术对照，但应按确切 SANS / CISPR / IEC 版次及南非接受路径核查。
summary.zht: 中國 EMC 文件可能引用 GB 4824 / CISPR 11 協調標準、GB 17625 諧波電流限值、GB/T 17626 抗擾度測試或其他 GB EMC 標準。這些報告可支持技術對照，但應按確切 SANS / CISPR / IEC 版次及南非接受路徑核查。

gap.en: The gap is edition mapping, laboratory acceptability, and installation context. Exporters should align conducted and radiated emissions, harmonic current, flicker, immunity, cable lengths, filters, and earthing assumptions with the South African file rather than relying only on a China EMC report.
gap.zh: 差距在于版次映射、实验室可接受性和安装场景。出口商应将传导和辐射发射、谐波电流、闪烁、抗扰度、电缆长度、滤波器和接地假设与南非文件对齐，而不应只依赖中国 EMC 报告。
gap.zht: 差距在於版次映射、實驗室可接受性和安裝場景。出口商應將傳導和輻射發射、諧波電流、閃爍、抗擾度、電纜長度、濾波器和接地假設與南非文件對齊，而不應只依賴中國 EMC 報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by NRCS, SANS conformity route, project owner, insurer, distributor, or installation approval; exact EMC standard selection is product- and project-specific.
mandatory_status.cn: Not directly equivalent — China GB EMC reports need edition and acceptance mapping before use in South Africa.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC evidence should be mapped to the accepted SANS / CISPR / IEC route for the specific inverter and project; a China GB EMC report is helpful evidence, not automatic South African acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EMC 证据应映射到该逆变器和项目被接受的 SANS / CISPR / IEC 路径；中国 GB EMC 报告是有用证据，但不会自动获得南非接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EMC 證據應映射到該逆變器和專案被接受的 SANS / CISPR / IEC 路徑；中國 GB EMC 報告是有用證據，但不會自動獲得南非接受。
